shell.disclaimer: phase.rs is a non-commercial fan project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Wizards of the Coast. Magic: The Gathering is © Wizards of the Coast LLC. Card images are fetched from Scryfall at runtime; card data is sourced from MTGJSON. No copyrighted WotC assets are bundled with this project.

resume.title: Resume Game
resume.description: Continue the last saved match from its current turn and board state.

setup.title: Play vs AI
setup.description: Play a solo match against an AI opponent — choose format, deck, archetype, and difficulty.

online.title: Play Online
online.description: Host a room, join by code, or reconnect to multiplayer.

draft.title: Draft
draft.description: Quick Draft against AI, cube draft, or host a pod draft.

decks.title: Decks
decks.description: Open saved decks, switch your active list, and edit builds.

preview.tooltip: Play the latest preview build — newest cards & fixes land here before each release.

alpha.label: Early Alpha
alpha.message: — expect broken cards and missing features.

dashboard.noActiveDeck: Pick a deck to get started
dashboard.feedsEmpty: Subscribe to a feed to see fresh decks
dashboard.tagline: An open-source Magic: The Gathering rules engine and game client

loadState.title: Load Game State
loadState.subtitle: Restore an exported or pasted state and continue against the AI.
loadState.fileSupports: Supports .json, .txt, and .zip exported from the Debug Panel

aiOpponent.heading: AI Opponent
aiOpponent.noLegalDecks: No legal AI decks are available for this format.
aiOpponent.coverageThresholdHint: Exclude decks below this engine-support threshold
aiOpponent.bracketHint: Random AI picks from these brackets. Untagged decks are excluded when filtering.

cedhToggle.label: cEDH mode
cedhToggle.hint: All opponents play cEDH. Every deck must be bracket 5.

importDeck.title: Import Deck
importDeck.urlHint: Imports a public deck from Moxfield or Archidekt.
importDeck.errorInvalidUrl: Enter a valid Moxfield or Archidekt deck URL.
importDeck.errorNetworkFailure: Couldn't reach the deck import service. Check your connection and try again.

precon.overwriteAllConfirm: All {{count}} selected decks already exist. Overwrite?
precon.overwriteSomeConfirm: {{conflicts}} of {{total}} selected decks already exist. Overwrite the duplicates? (Cancel keeps existing copies and imports the rest.)
precon.title: Preconstructed Decks
precon.subtitle: Sourced from MTGJSON AllDeckFiles — every WotC-printed precon.
precon.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, set code, or type…
precon.showingFirst: Showing first {{count}} — refine search to narrow.

deckTile.copyTitle: Copy to My Decks (removes feed tracking)

empty.title: No decks match this filter.
empty.selectHint: Import a compatible deck or change your format to see available decks.
empty.manageHint: Pick a different filter or show all decks to choose from your full collection.

subscriptions.emptyDescription: Subscribe to deck feeds to get curated deck collections that auto-update.

myDecksPage.title: Decks.
myDecksPage.description: Open a saved list, import a new one, or continue in deck builder.
